MERGE (src1:Source {id:'text:royal-ransomware-overview'})
ON CREATE SET
  src1.title = 'Royal ransomware overview (provided text)',
  src1.publisher = 'Provided Text'
ON MATCH SET
  src1.title = COALESCE(src1.title, 'Royal ransomware overview (provided text)'),
  src1.publisher = COALESCE(src1.publisher, 'Provided Text')
WITH src1

MERGE (ta1:ThreatActor {name:'Royal'})
ON CREATE SET
  ta1.summary = 'Ransomware threat actors who branded themselves as Royal; initially tracked by Microsoft as DEV-0569; primarily focused on targeting entities within the U.S.; observed using multiple ransomware types and other operations’ encryptors such as BlackCat; ramped up activity in September 2022.'
ON MATCH SET
  ta1.summary = CASE WHEN ta1.summary IS NULL OR ta1.summary = '' THEN 'Ransomware threat actors who branded themselves as Royal; initially tracked by Microsoft as DEV-0569; primarily focused on targeting entities within the U.S.; observed using multiple ransomware types and other operations’ encryptors such as BlackCat; ramped up activity in September 2022.' ELSE ta1.summary END

MERGE (ta2:ThreatActor {name:'DEV-0569'})
ON CREATE SET
  ta2.summary = 'Temporary name used by Microsoft to attribute distribution of Royal ransomware.'
ON MATCH SET
  ta2.summary = CASE WHEN ta2.summary IS NULL OR ta2.summary = '' THEN 'Temporary name used by Microsoft to attribute distribution of Royal ransomware.' ELSE ta2.summary END
WITH src1, ta1, ta2

MERGE (d1:Date {value: date('2022-01-01')})
MERGE (d2:Date {value: date('2022-09-01')})
MERGE (d3:Date {value: date('2022-11-01')})
WITH src1, ta1, ta2, d1, d2, d3

MERGE (mal1:Malware {name:'Royal ransomware'})
ON CREATE SET
  mal1.family = 'Royal',
  mal1.summary = 'Ransomware strain that emerged in January 2022; distributed by experienced ransomware actors; campaigns observed delivering via malicious attachments and malicious advertisements; uses .Royal extension for encrypted files.'
ON MATCH SET
  mal1.family = COALESCE(mal1.family, 'Royal'),
  mal1.summary = CASE WHEN mal1.summary IS NULL OR mal1.summary = '' THEN 'Ransomware strain that emerged in January 2022; distributed by experienced ransomware actors; campaigns observed delivering via malicious attachments and malicious advertisements; uses .Royal extension for encrypted files.' ELSE mal1.summary END

MERGE (mal2:Malware {name:'BlackCat'})
ON CREATE SET
  mal2.summary = 'Ransomware whose encryptors were observed being utilized by Royal operators (as stated in the provided text).'
ON MATCH SET
  mal2.summary = CASE WHEN mal2.summary IS NULL OR mal2.summary = '' THEN 'Ransomware whose encryptors were observed being utilized by Royal operators (as stated in the provided text).' ELSE mal2.summary END
WITH src1, ta1, ta2, d1, d2, d3, mal1, mal2

MERGE (c1:Campaign {name:'Royal ransomware campaigns'})
ON CREATE SET
  c1.summary = 'Campaigns distributing Royal ransomware via malicious attachments and malicious advertisements.'
ON MATCH SET
  c1.summary = CASE WHEN c1.summary IS NULL OR c1.summary = '' THEN 'Campaigns distributing Royal ransomware via malicious attachments and malicious advertisements.' ELSE c1.summary END
WITH src1, ta1, ta2, d1, d2, d3, mal1, mal2, c1

MERGE (t_phish:Technique {technique_id:'T1566'})
ON CREATE SET
  t_phish.name = 'Phishing',
  t_phish.tactic = 'Initial Access',
  t_phish.summary = 'Delivery via malicious attachments (phishing).'
ON MATCH SET
  t_phish.name = COALESCE(t_phish.name, 'Phishing'),
  t_phish.tactic = COALESCE(t_phish.tactic, 'Initial Access'),
  t_phish.summary = CASE WHEN t_phish.summary IS NULL OR t_phish.summary = '' THEN 'Delivery via malicious attachments (phishing).' ELSE t_phish.summary END

MERGE (t_maladv:Technique {technique_id:'T1583'})
ON CREATE SET
  t_maladv.name = 'Acquire Infrastructure',
  t_maladv.tactic = 'Resource Development',
  t_maladv.summary = 'Used here to represent distribution via malicious advertisements as described in the provided text.'
ON MATCH SET
  t_maladv.name = COALESCE(t_maladv.name, 'Acquire Infrastructure'),
  t_maladv.tactic = COALESCE(t_maladv.tactic, 'Resource Development'),
  t_maladv.summary = CASE WHEN t_maladv.summary IS NULL OR t_maladv.summary = '' THEN 'Used here to represent distribution via malicious advertisements as described in the provided text.' ELSE t_maladv.summary END
WITH src1, ta1, ta2, d1, d2, d3, mal1, mal2, c1, t_phish, t_maladv

MERGE (ctry1:Country {iso2:'US'})
ON CREATE SET ctry1.name = 'United States'
ON MATCH SET ctry1.name = COALESCE(ctry1.name, 'United States')

MERGE (ctry2:Country {iso2:'GB'})
ON CREATE SET ctry2.name = 'United Kingdom'
ON MATCH SET ctry2.name = COALESCE(ctry2.name, 'United Kingdom')
WITH src1, ta1, ta2, d1, d2, d3, mal1, mal2, c1, t_phish, t_maladv, ctry1, ctry2

MERGE (vic1:Victim {name:'Entities within the U.S.'})
ON CREATE SET

ON MATCH SET

MERGE (vic1)-[:located_in]->(ctry1)

MERGE (vic2:Victim {name:'Silverstone Circuit'})
ON CREATE SET
  vic2.country_iso2 = 'GB',
  vic2.summary = 'United Kingdom racing circuit targeted in a Royal ransomware attack (details not disclosed).'
ON MATCH SET
  vic2.country_iso2 = COALESCE(vic2.country_iso2, 'GB'),
  vic2.summary = CASE WHEN vic2.summary IS NULL OR vic2.summary = '' THEN 'United Kingdom racing circuit targeted in a Royal ransomware attack (details not disclosed).' ELSE vic2.summary END

MERGE (vic2)-[:located_in]->(ctry2)
WITH src1, ta1, ta2, d1, d2, d3, mal1, mal2, c1, t_phish, t_maladv, vic1, vic2

MERGE (inc1:Incident {id:'inc:royal:2022-11:silverstone-circuit'})
ON CREATE SET
  inc1.date = date('2022-11-01'),
  inc1.type = 'ransomware',
  inc1.summary = 'By November 2022, Royal took responsibility for a ransomware attack on Silverstone Circuit (UK); details not disclosed; Emsisoft analyst Brett Callow stated Royal encryption cannot be broken.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc1.date = COALESCE(inc1.date, date('2022-11-01')),
  inc1.type = COALESCE(inc1.type, 'ransomware'),
  inc1.summary = CASE WHEN inc1.summary IS NULL OR inc1.summary = '' THEN 'By November 2022, Royal took responsibility for a ransomware attack on Silverstone Circuit (UK); details not disclosed; Emsisoft analyst Brett Callow stated Royal encryption cannot be broken.' ELSE inc1.summary END

MERGE (inc1)-[:targets {date: date('2022-11-01'), evidence:'By November 2022, Royal took responsibility for a ransomware attack on Silverstone Circuit.', source_id:'text:royal-ransomware-overview', page:''}]->(vic2)
MERGE (inc1)-[:occurred_in]->(ctry2)
MERGE (inc1)-[:occurred_on {date: date('2022-11-01')}]->(d3)
WITH src1, ta1, ta2, d1, d2, mal1, mal2, c1, t_phish, t_maladv, vic1, inc1

MERGE (inc1)-[:attributed_to {confidence:'stated', evidence:'Royal took responsibility for the attack.', source_id:'text:royal-ransomware-overview', page:''}]->(ta1)
MERGE (inc1)-[:involved_malware {evidence:'Royal ransomware attack claimed by Royal.', source_id:'text:royal-ransomware-overview', page:''}]->(mal1)
WITH src1, ta1, ta2, d1, d2, mal1, mal2, c1, t_phish, t_maladv, vic1, inc1

MERGE (ta2)-[:has_alias {date: date('2022-01-01')}]->(ta1)
MERGE (ta2)-[:supported_by {page:'', quote:'Initially, Microsoft attributed the distribution of Royal ransomware to DEV-0569... Now, researchers are stating that the threat actors behind Royal ransomware have officially branded themselves with the name Royal.'}]->(src1)
MERGE (ta1)-[:supported_by {page:'', quote:'Threat actors behind Royal ransomware have officially branded themselves with the name Royal and are primarily focused on targeting entities within the U.S.'}]->(src1)
MERGE (mal1)-[:supported_by {page:'', quote:'After emerging in January 2022, Royal ransomware is a ransomware strain... Some Royal ransomware campaigns distribute the malware via malicious attachments... malicious advertisements.'}]->(src1)
WITH src1, ta1, d1, d2, mal1, mal2, c1, t_phish, t_maladv, vic1, inc1

MERGE (ta1)-[:uses {date: date('2022-09-01'), evidence:'In September 2022, Royal operators were observed utilizing other ransomware operation\'s encryptors, such as BlackCat.', source_id:'text:royal-ransomware-overview', page:''}]->(mal2)
MERGE (mal1)-[:uses {date: date('2022-09-01'), evidence:'Royal operators utilizing other ransomware operation\'s encryptors, such as BlackCat.', source_id:'text:royal-ransomware-overview', page:''}]->(mal2)
